generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text presents a persuasive argument about unfair burden-sharing in NATO, which resonates with the profile's competitive and skeptical traits. request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our allies take advantage of our generosity. Why should we keep carrying the burden when countries like Germany spend just 1.5% of GDP on defense? It's time to put America first and demand fair burden-sharing. #NATO #NationalSecurity
